items.title: BitAxe
items.description: BitAxe is an open-source, low-power Bitcoin ASIC miner designed for home mining. It bridges the gap between industrial-scale equipment and hobbyist participation in network security.

items.title: HashRate Index
items.description: Data and analytics platform for Bitcoin mining. Tracks miner revenue, profitability, power consumption by rig, and historical ASIC pricing.

items.title: Home Mining
items.description: Practical guide to solo and pooled mining at home using consumer hardware, hash marketplaces, and Stratum V2 / DATUM template control.

items.title: KaboomRacks
items.description: ASIC mining hardware marketplace. Sells refurbished and used miners, often at prices accessible to home miners.
